name: Chocolate Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together sugar and butter.
2. Add cream cheese, milk, and vanilla; blend well.
3. In another bowl, combine flour, cocoa, cinnamon, and baking powder.
4. Gradually add dry ingredients to the creamed mixture and mix well.
5. Stir in chopped nuts and chocolate chips.
6. Refrigerate for 1 hour.
7. Roll into 1-inch balls and place on a greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake at 375°F for 15 to 20 minutes.
9. Remove from the cookie sheet and place on wax paper.
10. Make a soft icing or icing out of melted chocolate chips; dip cookies while still warm.
